heading: Partner’s return must be consistent with partnership return
label: 6222 Partner’s return must be consistent with partnership return
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6222, added , , ; amended , , ; , , , required partner’s return to be consistent with partnership return or Secretary to be notified of inconsistency, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A partner shall, on the partner’s return, treat any partnership-related item in a manner which is consistent with the treatment of such item on the partnership return.

children.heading: Underpayment due to inconsistent treatment assessed as math error
children.label: b Underpayment due to inconsistent treatment assessed as math error
children.text: Any underpayment of tax by a partner by reason of failing to comply with the requirements of subsection (a) shall be assessed and collected in the same manner as if such underpayment were on account of a mathematical or clerical error appearing on the partner’s return. Paragraph (2) of section 6213(b) shall not apply to any assessment of an underpayment referred to in the preceding sentence.

children.heading: Exception for notification of inconsistent treatment
children.label: c Exception for notification of inconsistent treatment
i
children.text: the partnership has filed a return but the partner’s treatment on the partner’s return is (or may be) inconsistent with the treatment of the item on the partnership return, or

children.label: ii
children.text: the partnership has not filed a return, and

children.label: B
children.text: the partner files with the Secretary a statement identifying the inconsistency,

children.label: A
children.text: demonstrates to the satisfaction of the Secretary that the treatment of the item on the partner’s return is consistent with the treatment of the item on the statement furnished to the partner by the partnership, and

children.label: B
children.text: elects to have this paragraph apply with respect to that item.

children.heading: Final decision on certain positions not binding on partnership
children.label: d Final decision on certain positions not binding on partnership
children.text: Any final decision with respect to an inconsistent position identified under subsection (c) in a proceeding to which the partnership is not a party shall not be binding on the partnership.

children.heading: Addition to tax for failure to comply with section
children.label: e Addition to tax for failure to comply with section
children.text: For addition to tax in the case of a partner’s disregard of the requirements of this section, see part II of subchapter A of chapter 68.
